assumptions.tariff_note: Real tariff from feed-in-tarrifs.xlsx; 11.5 ct fixed to Mar-2022, peak 39.91 ct Aug-2022, ~11.9 ct after.
assumptions.kwp_note: documented per-inverter kWp unreliable; empirical kWp used
assumptions.mass_balance: potential = actual + curtailment + downtime + partial + noise (asserted)

summary.baseline: Beats ASTM E2848 / IEC temp-corrected PR on all 65 inverters (nMAE 1.53 vs 2.53 / 2.58%).

degradation.caveat: Absolute degradation is a range (~-0.5 to -1.0 %/yr): the clearest-sky reference itself trends +1.09%/yr (sensor drift OR real post-2020 brightening). Relative module-type ranking is robust; mapping validated via DC-voltage fingerprints (91% of variance).
